strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital) covering both frontend and backend
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — exact match to a required competency
Cloud and containerization breadth: AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes at GISCollective, Docker at Altom — covers the cloud/infra requirements comprehensively
concerns: No Nest.js mentioned anywhere in the resume — a gap in the primary stack that would require onboarding time
Testing experience demonstrated through TDD practice and a D-language assertions library, but no explicit Jest, Vitest, or Playwright usage is cited
Kotlin absent entirely; Java appears only in embedded/robotics contexts at Altom, not in backend services work
response.justification: Bogdan has 14+ years of professional experience, well exceeding the 6-year requirement, with strong direct evidence of TypeScript, Node.js, and React across three recent senior engagements. His current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement. Cloud and containerization competency is demonstrated concretely via AWS CDK (Optilyz), Kubernetes (GISCollective), and Docker (Altom). The primary gaps are Nest.js — not mentioned at all — and testing frameworks: while TDD discipline is evident, no resume entry names Jest, Vitest, or Playwright specifically. Kotlin is entirely absent, and Java usage is limited to non-backend contexts. These are learnable gaps for a candidate of this seniority, making the overall fit strong.
